fallback_warning: DOWNSIZED SINGLE-SECTION FALLBACK, NOT THE ATLAS-SCALE RUN. These results are from a 5,488-cell single MERFISH section, used because the primary 124k-cell atlas run is OOM-infeasible (it requires a 232.60 GiB CUDA allocation on a 23.40 GiB GPU; see `notes` below). Being single-section, the conserved/sample-specific distinction is degenerate (slice_id has 1 level) and conserved_fraction must NOT be cited. Do NOT cite these numbers as the 124k atlas-scale result; no manuscript claim depends on the atlas run (manuscript/DRAFT.md keeps all biological/performance claims 'planned').
